summary: Iteration 138: Admin Arbitration Detail Page UX Refonte - All 4 zones verified working. Zone 1 (verdict banner with certainty badge, responsibility/rule phrases), Zone 2 (positions with VS separator, 'dit :' wording, disagreement phrase), Zone 3 (collapsible witnesses section), Zone 4 (3 outcome options with clear labels, note validation, submit button states). Tech details accordion closed by default. Backend APIs unchanged and working (10 passed, 4 skipped due to no escalated disputes).

backend_api_tests.test_01_login_admin_user: PASS - Admin login returns JWT with role=admin
backend_api_tests.test_02_login_non_admin_user: PASS - Non-admin login returns JWT with role=user
backend_api_tests.test_08_admin_can_access_arbitration_lis: PASS - Returns empty list (no escalated disputes)

frontend_ux_tests.zone1_verdict_banner: PASS - Shows 'Decision evidente' badge with red styling
frontend_ux_tests.zone1_responsibility_phrase: PASS - 'Le participant n'a fourni aucun element pour prouver sa presence'
frontend_ux_tests.zone1_rule_phrase: PASS - 'Sans preuve, la regle du systeme est d'appliquer une penalite'
frontend_ux_tests.zone1_tech_accordion_closed_default: PASS - Tech details accordion closed by default
frontend_ux_tests.zone1_tech_accordion_opens_on_click: PASS - Tech details grid visible after click
frontend_ux_tests.zone2_positions_bloc: PASS - Shows 'Ce que disent les parties' with Organisateur/Participant cards
frontend_ux_tests.zone2_vs_separator: PASS - VS separator between position cards
frontend_ux_tests.zone2_dit_wording: PASS - 'dit :' wording present in position cards
frontend_ux_tests.zone2_disagreement_phrase: PASS - Italic disagreement phrase shown when positions differ
frontend_ux_tests.zone3_witnesses_toggle: PASS - 'Ce que disent les autres participants' collapsible section
frontend_ux_tests.zone3_witnesses_closed_default: PASS - Witnesses section closed by default
frontend_ux_tests.zone3_witnesses_opens_on_click: PASS - Witnesses content visible after click
frontend_ux_tests.zone4_outcome_options: PASS - 3 options: Present/Aucune penalite, Absent/Penalite appliquee, En retard/Penalite partielle
frontend_ux_tests.zone4_submit_disabled_no_outcome: PASS - Submit button disabled without outcome
frontend_ux_tests.zone4_submit_disabled_no_note: PASS - Submit button disabled without note
frontend_ux_tests.zone4_submit_disabled_short_note: PASS - Submit button disabled with note < 5 chars
frontend_ux_tests.zone4_submit_enabled_valid: PASS - Submit button enabled with valid outcome + note (5+ chars)
frontend_ux_tests.back_button: PASS - 'Retour a la liste' button present

critical_code_review_comments: VerdictBanner component handles 3 certainty levels (evident/analyser/ambigue) with appropriate colors
Tech details accordion uses showTechDetails state initialized to false (closed by default)
Witnesses section uses showWitnesses state initialized to false (closed by default)
Position cards display human-readable wording via POSITION_HUMAN map
Disagreement phrase generated dynamically via buildDisagreementPhrase()
Submit button correctly disabled when !selectedOutcome || !note || note.trim().length < 5
All data-testids present for testing: verdict-bloc, certainty-badge, toggle-tech-details, positions-bloc, etc.

success_rate.backend: 100% (10/10 passed, 4 skipped due to no test data)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing dispute which was resolved during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Arbitration Detail page UX refonte complete. All 4 zones working: Zone 1 (verdict with certainty badge), Zone 2 (positions with VS), Zone 3 (collapsible witnesses), Zone 4 (decision options). The only escalated dispute was resolved during testing, so stats now show 0 escalated and 5 resolved. Login at /signin. French language throughout.
